Stock accounting tracking stock moves for receptions, deliveries,
consume, usage_giving, inventory and production.

Stock valuation by lots/serial number

documentation: Part of Odoo. See LICENSE file for full copyright and licensing details.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.product_product.ProductProduct._compute_value_svl
documentation:
Compute `value_svl` and `quantity_svl`.
Overwrite to allow multiple prices per location

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.product_product.ProductProduct._run_fifo_vacuum
documentation:
Compensate layer valued at an estimated price with the
price of future receipts if any. If the estimated price is equals to
the real price, no layer is created but the original layer is marked
as compensated. It will be done for each stock location.

```
param company

recordset of  to limit the execution of the vacuum
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_move.StockMove._create_in_svl
documentation: nu se mai face in mod automat evaluarea la intrare in stoc

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_move.StockMove._create_out_svl
documentation: nu se mai face in mod automat evaluarea la iserirea din stoc

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_move.StockMove._create_internal_transit_in_svl
documentation:
- Se creaza SVL prin metoda _create_out_svl, dar pastram remaining
- SVL vor fi inregistrare cu - pe contul de gestiune de origine.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_move.StockMove._create_internal_transit_out_svl
documentation:
- Se creaza SVL prin copiere, pastram remaining
- Daca nu avem o inlantuire, si transportul este manual, iesirea de face fifo.
- SVL vor fi inregistrare cu + pe contul de gestiune de destinatie.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_move.StockMove._create_internal_transfer_svl
documentation: cred ca este mai bine sa generam doua svl - o intrare si o iesire

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_move.StockMove._action_done
documentation: In case of single move line update locations of the stock move

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_valuation_layer.StockValuationLayer._l10n_ro_pre_process_value
documentation:
Pentru a mapa tracking pe SVL in value pastram o cheie
'l10n_ro_tracking': [(svl_id, qty).....]
inainte sa executam .create() curatam dictionarul.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.models.stock_valuation_layer.StockValuationLayer._l10n_ro_post_process
documentation:
Pentru a mapa l10n_ro_tracking pe SVL in value pastram o cheie
'l10n_ro_tracking': [(svl_id, qty).....]
acum este momentul sa mapam sursa, destinatia si cantitatea.

functions.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.init_hook.pre_init_hook
documentation:
The objective of this hook is to speed up the installation
of the module on an existing Odoo instance.

Without this script, if a database has a few hundred thousand
partners, which is not unlikely, the update will take
at least a few hours.

The pre init script writes the digits from vat fields to the
l10n_ro_vat_number so that it is not computed by the install.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_purchase.TestStockPurchase.test_nir_with_invoice
documentation:
Receptie produse in depozit in baza facturii
 - in stoc valoarea de achiztie
 - in contabilitate valoarea de achiztie
 - in diferente de pret zero
 - in TVA neexigibilă zero

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_purchase.TestStockPurchase.test_nir_with_invoice_location_valuation
documentation:
Receptie produse in locatie cu alta evaluare in baza facturii
 - in stoc valoarea de achiztie
 - in contabilitate valoarea de achiztie
 - in diferente de pret zero
 - in TVA neexigibilă zero

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_sale.TestStockSale.test_sale_and_invoice
documentation:
Vanzare si facturare
     - initial in stoc si contabilitate este valoarea din achizitie
     - dupa vanzare valoarea stocului trebuie sa scada cu valoarea stocului
     vandut
     - valoarea din stoc trebuie sa fie egala cu valoarea din contabilitate
     - in contul de venituri trebuie sa fie inregistrata valoarea de vanzare

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_sale.TestStockSale.test_sale_and_invoice_and_retur
documentation:
Vanzare si facturare
 - initial in stoc si contabilitate este valoarea din achizitie
 - dupa vanzare valoarea stocului trebuie sa scada cu valoarea stocului vandut
 - valoarea din stoc trebuie sa fie egala cu valoarea din contabilitate
 - in contul de venituri trebuie sa fie inregistrata valoarea de vanzare

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_sale_return_not_fifo.TestStockSaleReturn.test_not_fifo_return1
documentation: Test FIFO valuation method for stock accounting in case of return from sale

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_sale_return_not_fifo.TestStockSaleReturn.test_not_fifo_return2
documentation:
Test FIFO valuation method for stock accounting in case of return from sale

Test case vanzare
Achizitie 5 buc la 50 lei
Achizitie 20 buc la 75 lei
Vanzare 15 buc
Retur partial 7 buc
    Rezultat asteptat - revin 5 cu 50 lei si 2 cu 75 lei.
Retur partial 1 buc
    Rezultat asteptat - revine 1 buc cu 75 lei pe stoc.


                Cant        Preț                    Valoare stoc
achiziție       5           50      250     250
achiziție           20      75      1500        1750
vanzare        -15
 -vanzare           -5      50      -250        1500
 -vanzare           -10     75      -750        750
retur1          7
 -retur         5           50      250     1000
 -retur         2           75      150     1150
retur2
 -retur         1           75      75      1550

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_ro_stock_account_tracking.tests.test_sale_return_not_fifo.TestStockSaleReturn.test_not_fifo_return3
documentation:
Test FIFO valuation method for stock accounting in case of return from sale

Test case vanzare
Achizitie 2 buc la 3 lei
Achizitie 3 buc la 4 lei
Vanzare 5 buc
Retur partial 3 buc
    Rezultat asteptat - revin 2 cu 3 lei si una cu 4 lei.
Retur partial 1 buc
    Rezultat asteptat - revine 1 buc cu 4 lei pe stoc
